items.name: Fallen Archangel Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🌑Cloaked in Darkness, Bound by Power 🌑
Step into the shadows with the Fallen Archangel Coat—a long, ominous garment that radiates dark elegance. The flowing black-and-red robes combined with massive raven-black wings and demonic horns create a look of both terror and majesty. This is the perfect attire for those who walk the thin line between angel and demon.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Dark, regal coat with flowing textures and layered detail
Massive black wings for an intimidating presence
Demonic horn accents to complete the fallen look
Built with PBR textures for realistic shadows, fabric depth, and shine
🔍 Keywords: fallen angel, dark wings, demon, gothic coat, villain, shadow, Roblox outfit, PBR
⚔️ Embrace the forbidden power and command respect with every step. This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
